lens.description: The panelist's assigned lens/role (e.g. pragmatist, skeptic, first-principles, domain-expert).

answer.description: This panelist's INDEPENDENT answer to the question, in its own lens. Do not reference other panelists.

key_claims.description: The load-bearing claims behind the answer, one per item.

grounding.description: For each key claim, the check, source, or real-world constraint that backs it. An ungrounded claim should say so.

confidence.description: This panelist's own confidence in its answer.

blind_spots.description: What this lens may be missing or where it is weakest.
